text:
There once was a village nestled among hills. Every morning the sun would rise and shine a golden light over the peaceful town. Nestled by a river were the richest mines ever discovered. Farmers grew fantastic crops. There was magic everywhere.

One village elder said every bird was enchanted. The blackbirds knew ancient secrets.

The cat that could read minds? That was Lady Gryffindor.

Every village mouse knew the mines' secrets. Every rat could navigate the terrain better than an elephant on all fours.

One day the birds fell into enemy territory. They knew they had to fly over woods full of traps. Who could warn them?

The cat? That was Arcturus Owl.

Arcturus Owl had climbed every peak. He had roosted high atop the crystal mines. He had heard secrets whispered long ago.

They needed luck.

That was them.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
